definitions: 石英；二氧化硅形成的常见矿物，常见于沙子中。

examples.text: These react together to form silicon dioxide, whose molecules arrange themselves into a regular crystalline form known as quartz. Quartz is commonly found in sand, where it often makes up most of the grains
examples.explanation: 这句话说明：二氧化硅（silicon dioxide）会形成一种规则的晶体结构，这种晶体就叫 quartz（石英）。石英在沙子中很常见，常常构成大部分沙粒。

source.text: 玻璃为何是透明的? ——马克·米奥多尼克
